emails.subject: when you are ready
emails.body: Hey guys, Call me when you are ready to talk about Red Rock Energy and Williams deals. Carole C, Frank Enron Net Works 713.345.3960 work 713.446.9307 cell

emails.subject: RE: when you are ready
emails.body: RE: when you are ready I will call you shortly Theresa will not be needed so we can to it quicker. Paul To: Lucci, Paul T.; Staab, Theresa

emails.subject: RE: when you are ready
emails.body: I am trying to include Jay in this since it affects his book. I scheduled a conference room for 2 p.m. so that we can talk to you on loud speaker. Can we still talk at 2 p.m? To: Frank, Carole
